series_metadata.series_title: Fiscal Oversight- Fiscal Caution and Fiscal Watch
series_metadata.series_description: Files contain documentation concerning school districts under fiscal oversight status of Fiscal Caution or Fiscal Watch. Files may include designation of Fiscal Caution or Fiscal Watch status, correspondence, written proposals to eliminate deficits, financial recovery plans, monitoring reports, etc., and release from Fiscal Caution or Fiscal Watch status.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: For oversight period and not to exceed five (5) years, then destroy ; Paper: For oversight period and not to exceed five (5) years, then destroy, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
